title: A Ghost Ship and a Living Skeleton: Rising Conflict
description: In the Thriller Bark storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #5, Brook, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #7 as the scene develops across pages 5–8.

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: Oh, how wonderful that ability seemed!

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: On the ship you saw earlier,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: My soul was returned from the underworld!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You're just as stupid as zero, huh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The roots of my hair are strong.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Have you seen yourself in a mirror?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Look carefully. You don't have a shadow!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: UWAH! It's true!! What are you??

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: How can you be that calm!?
